channel.title: Data Extensions on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Data Extensions on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: CodeQL now supports sanitizers and validators in models-as-data
item.description:
CodeQL data extensions now support defining custom sanitizers and validators in models-as-data. This adds new ways to model how data is cleaned or checked in code scanning rules.

  • Source: GitHub
